meta.title: Kemcon — Premium Fabrics & Furnishings
meta.description: Discover Kemcon's premium collection of fabrics, cushions, pillows, and sofas — trusted by luxury hotels across the Middle East.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Established in 1985, Kemcon crafts premium fabrics and furnishings for elite hotels and homes across the Middle East — backed by 40 years of artisanal expertise.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Reach Kemcon's team in Cairo for premium fabrics, custom upholstery, mockups, and bulk hospitality orders. Showroom and factory locations available.

clients.title: Our Clients & Partners
clients.description: Discover the luxury hotels and resorts across Egypt, KSA, UAE, and Jordan that trust Kemcon for premium fabrics, upholstery, and custom furnishings.

products.title: Our Products
products.description: From bespoke configuration to mass production — explore Kemcon's full range of curtains, chairs, sofas, bed linen, and custom hospitality furnishings.

configure.title: Configure Your Product
configure.description: Design every detail of your fabric or furnishing — choose materials, colours, patterns, and dimensions, then send your brief to Kemcon's team.

showroom.title: Fabric Showroom
showroom.description: Browse Kemcon's full fabric library — sheers, blackouts, velvets, linens, and silks across hundreds of colours and patterns from leading mills worldwide.

designPlan.title: Design & Plan
designPlan.description: Share your project — hotel, resort, or residence — and Kemcon's design team will plan the fabrics, finishes, and furnishings tailored to your space.

massProduction.title: Mass Production
massProduction.description: Bulk orders for hospitality and developers — Kemcon manufactures curtains, upholstery, and bed linen at scale with consistent luxury-grade quality.

curtains.title: Bespoke Curtains
curtains.description: Bespoke curtains in hundreds of fabrics — sheer, blackout, velvet, linen, and more. Manual or remote-controlled, made to your measurements.

chairs.title: Custom Chairs
chairs.description: Fully custom chairs from Kemcon — choose your frame material, finish, filling firmness, and upholstery fabric for hospitality or residential projects.

sofas.title: Bespoke Sofas
sofas.description: Bespoke sofas built from scratch by Kemcon — select every element from the frame wood to the final fabric and pattern, made for any space.

bedSheets.title: Premium Bed Sheets
bedSheets.description: Premium bed linen in Egyptian cotton, silk, satin, and more — in any colour and pattern from Kemcon's curated catalog. Hotel-grade comfort.

custom.title: Custom Solutions
custom.description: Have something unique in mind? Describe your vision and Kemcon's team will craft fabrics, upholstery, or furnishings exactly to your specification.

hero.title: Crafting Luxury,
hero.description: From the finest Egyptian cotton to bespoke upholstery, Kemcon delivers unmatched quality to hotels and homes across the Middle East.

about.label: About Kemcon
about.title: A Legacy of Excellence
about.heroDescription: Originally established in 1985, Kemcon has evolved into one of the leading manufacturing groups in the region — trusted by elite hotel chains across the Middle East.
about.description: Kemcon has grown to become one of the leading manufacturing groups in the region. Through our diversified facilities, we have secured a strong market share across both corporate and business sectors. Egytex, the fabrics manufacturing arm of the Group, is the foundation of our craftsmanship.
about.descriptionSecondary: Our corporate business serves elite hotel chains with exclusive designs and high-quality fabrics, alongside a full spectrum of services: Cover, Tailoring, Installation, Mockup, Upholstery, and Furniture. Upon request, we provide samples and color swatches. We also offer special finishing and treatments complying with international standards — including Stain Protection, Fire Proof, and Anti-Fungus treatments.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: To be the definitive standard of luxury in fabrics and furnishings across the Middle East — setting the benchmark for quality that hotels and homes aspire to.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To craft exceptional fabrics and furnishings that transform spaces into havens of comfort and elegance, while maintaining the artisanal quality that has defined us for over four decades.

products.label: Our Collection
products.title: Crafted for Comfort
products.description: Explore our premium range of fabrics and furnishings, designed with the same quality trusted by luxury hotels worldwide.
products.heroDescription: Choose a category, configure every detail — fabric, colour, pattern, and more — then send us your vision. No two pieces are alike.
products.categoriesDescription: Select a category to begin your bespoke configuration. Each piece is made to order.

curtains.name: Curtains
curtains.description: Bespoke curtains in hundreds of fabrics — sheer, blackout, velvet, linen, and more. Manual or remote-controlled.

chairs.name: Chairs
chairs.description: Fully custom chairs — choose your frame material, finish, filling firmness, and upholstery fabric.

sofas.name: Sofas
sofas.description: Bespoke sofas built from scratch. Select every element from the frame wood to the final fabric and pattern.

bedSheets.name: Bed Sheets
bedSheets.description: Premium bed linen in Egyptian cotton, silk, satin, and more — in any colour and pattern from our catalog.

custom.name: Custom Solution
custom.description: Have something unique in mind? Describe your vision and our team will craft it exactly to your specification.

fabrics.name: Premium Fabrics
fabrics.description: Luxurious textiles sourced from the finest mills, available in a stunning range of textures, patterns, and colors.

cushions.name: Designer Cushions
cushions.description: Handcrafted cushions that combine elegance with comfort, perfect for adding a touch of luxury to any space.

pillows.name: Luxury Pillows
pillows.description: Hotel-grade pillows engineered for the perfect night's sleep, using premium fills and breathable fabrics.

quality.title: Uncompromising Quality
quality.description: Every product undergoes rigorous quality checks to meet the exacting standards of luxury hospitality.

craftsmanship.title: Expert Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.description: Our skilled artisans bring decades of experience to every piece, ensuring flawless execution.

materials.title: Premium Materials
materials.description: We source only the finest raw materials from trusted suppliers worldwide.

clients.label: Our Partners
clients.title: Trusted by Leading Hotels
clients.description: Kemcon proudly serves prestigious hotels and resorts across Egypt, Saudi Arabia, Emirates, and Jordan.

cta.title: Experience Kemcon Quality
cta.description: Bring hotel-grade luxury into your home. Discover our premium collection of fabrics and furnishings.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.description: Whether you're a hotel looking for premium furnishings or a homeowner seeking luxury, we'd love to hear from you.

footer.description: Established in 1985, Kemcon is a leading manufacturing group specialising in premium fabrics and furnishings for elite hotels and homes across the Middle East.
